stories.title: MLBx All-Star 3-On-3 RESULTS — Team Victorino Wins, Rachel Garcia Earns MVP
stories.angle: Recap. Garcia delivered the signature moment. AUSL softball had its biggest national showcase and a clear hero to celebrate.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Team Victorino wins the inaugural MLBx 3-on-3.

Rachel Garcia: 18 points. Walk-off HR in the semis. MVP.

Championship: Team Victorino 48, Team Howard 39.

Softball's biggest All-Star Week moment is in the record books. 🥎

#AUSL #MLBx #Softball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Rachel Garcia: the face of the inaugural MLBx 3-on-3.

18 points. Walk-off HR to knock out NiJaree Canady's team in the semis. MVP.

Team Victorino 48, Team Howard 39 in the final.

Softball had its moment. 🥎

#AUSL #MLBx #Softball

x_posts.label: Post 1-3
x_posts.text: Rachel Garcia. MVP. Team Victorino wins the first-ever MLBx 3-on-3. 🥎 #MLBx #AUSL

research.facts:
MLBx All-Star 3-On-3 Results
**Sources:**
- Philadelphia Inquirer: "Team Victorino wins inaugural MLBx 3-on-3 at Citizens Bank Park" (July 12, 2026)
- AUSL.com news: "4 AUSL Stars in MLBx: All-Star 3-on-3" — confirmed Garcia MVP
- MLB.com: "AUSL Stars Join MLB Stars for MLBx All-Star 3-on-3" — results confirmed
**Verified Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Team Victorino won the inaugural MLBx: All-Star 3-on-3 Presented by Ito En
- Championship: Team Victorino defeated Team Howard, 48-39
- Rachel Garcia (Texas Volts) was named MVP
- Garcia scored a game-high 18 at-bat points in the championship
- Garcia hit a walk-off home run in the semifinal to eliminate Team Jones
- Team Jones comprised Andruw Jones, NiJaree Canady, Antonio Cipriano
- Team Rollins (Tiare Jennings, Jimmy Rollins, Terrell Owens) also eliminated in semis
- Event held at Citizens Bank Park, Philadelphia, on Peacock
- Rachel Garcia: Olympic silver medal Tokyo 2020; 2019 WCWS title with UCLA
- Andruw Jones was inducted into Baseball Hall of Fame this week (Cooperstown)
**Freshness:** Results confirmed as of July 12 evening. Recap angle is July 13 natural follow-through.

stories.title: AUSL Standings Race — The Bandits Are on a Historic Run
stories.angle: A team that started 0-4 is now on the longest winning streak in league history and within striking distance of the No. 1 seed. That is a genuine underdog arc in real time.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The Chicago Bandits are on a 7-game winning streak — the longest in AUSL history.

They started 0-4. They're now chasing Utah for the No. 1 seed.

7 games left. The race is on.

#AUSL #Softball #ChicagoBandits

research.facts:
AUSL Standings — Bandits Historic Win Streak
**Sources:**
- Just Baseball: "Chicago Bandits offensive depth powers seven-game win streak" — confirmed 7-game streak, called it "longest in AUSL history"
- Pipeline status records: Bandits at "10-7 6-game streak" (July 9 pipeline), "11 Cascade 3 run rule" win July 11 confirmed in July 12 pipeline
**Verified Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Chicago Bandits: 7-game winning streak (longest in AUSL history per Just Baseball)
- Bandits started the season 0-4
**Verified Facts (MEDIUM confidence — standings pages 403'd during research):**
- Bandits approximately 13-7 (based on streak from 0-4 + 0-4 start, 13 wins, 7 losses)
- Utah Talons approximately 14-6 (based on July 10 pipeline "14-5 first place" then one loss July 11)
- Regular season ends July 20
**Confirmed from prior pipelines (HIGH):**
- Championship Series: July 25-27, Davis Diamond, College Station, TX
- No. 1 seed earns direct bye to Championship Series

stories.title: PGF Nationals Roster Freeze — TODAY Is the Day
stories.angle: Today is it. No more "X days until the freeze." The window closes in hours. If your family has roster moves pending, they must happen before 10 PM PST tonight.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
PGF Nationals roster freeze: TONIGHT.

July 13 at 11:59 PM PST.

After that: locked through August 2.

System maintenance starts 10 PM PST — all roster moves must be done before then.

Don't wait. #PGFNationals #Softball

research.facts:
PGF Nationals Roster Freeze
**Sources:**
- PGF Rules and Regulations page (premiergirlsfastpitch.com)
- PGF Nationals website (pgfnationals.com)
- Prior pipeline tracking: first mentioned June 30; freeze date confirmed July 13 11:59 PM PST consistently
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- Roster freeze deadline: July 13, 2026 at 11:59 PM PST
- After cutoff: rosters locked through August 2
- PGF system maintenance: July 13 10:00 PM PST — July 14 10:00 AM PST
- Roster changes must be completed BEFORE 10 PM PST tonight
- PGF Nationals begin: July 19, 2026 at Great Park, Irvine, California
- Week 1: 18U and 16U divisions

stories.title: Megan Grant ESPYs — 2 Days Left to Vote
stories.angle: Two votes left, with the final day being both the last chance and the announcement night. The urgency is at its peak.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
MEGAN GRANT. ESPYS. 2 DAYS.

Wednesday July 15 is the LAST DAY to vote — it's also the night of the show. ABC. 8 PM ET.

42 HRs. Broke a 31-year NCAA record. Vote once per day at ESPN.com.

#ESPYs #Softball

research.facts:
Megan Grant ESPYs
**Sources:**
- AUSL Cascade team page: "Vote Megan Grant 2026 ESPY" (active promotional page)
- UCLA Bruins official site: Grant nomination confirmed
- ESPN Press Room: 2026 ESPY nominees and categories confirmed
- ESPN.com: voting portal active
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- Grant nominated: Best Record-Breaking Performance at 34th ESPYs
- Grant's record: 42 home runs, NCAA Division I single-season record, UCLA 2026
- Previous record: 37 HRs, Laura Espinoza, Arizona, 1995 (held 31 years)
- ESPYs air: July 15, 2026 at 8 PM ET on ABC and ESPN app
- Voting closes: July 15 (same day as show)
- Vote once per day at ESPN.com
- Competitors: Myles Garrett, Johannes Høsflot Klæbo, Sabastian Sawe
- Grant also: No. 4 overall AUSL pick, Portland Cascade
- Grant AUSL: 313-ft home run (first measured AUSL HR distance record)
- Grant UCLA career: 91 home runs (all-time leader)
- Marcello Hernández is hosting the 2026 ESPYs

stories.title: NiJaree Canady — Comeback Watch, Volts vs. Blaze Tonight at Dell Diamond
stories.angle: The comeback has a concrete test tonight. Seven games left in the regular season — the window to turn it around is closing.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
NiJaree Canady and the Texas Volts face the Carolina Blaze TONIGHT.

7 PM ET. Dell Diamond. Round Rock, TX.

Mechanics reset with Stanford coach Tori Nyberg is in progress. 7 games left in the season.

Can "OG NiJa" show up? 🥎

#AUSL #Softball #TexasVolts

research.facts:
NiJaree Canady / Volts vs. Blaze
**Sources:**
- Sports Illustrated: "Why the Texas Volts Called Stanford to Help NiJaree Canady" — detailed mechanics story
- Yahoo Sports: Texas Volts vs. Carolina Blaze game listing, 7 PM ET, Dell Diamond, Round Rock TX (July 13)
- Prior pipeline records: Canady stats (0-3, 6.87 ERA) consistently tracked since July 3
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- NiJaree Canady AUSL stats: 0-3, 6.87 ERA
- Tori Nyberg: former Stanford pitching coach, brought in by Texas Volts
- Nyberg originally recruited Canady at Stanford
- Mechanics issue: body positioning shifted from "squared up" (Stanford) to "open" stance (attributed to Texas Tech injury adjustments)
- Goal: restore "OG NiJa" — Canady's Stanford-era form
- Canady was No. 2 overall AUSL pick
- AUSL regular season ends July 20
**Verified Facts (MEDIUM):**
- Tonight's game: Volts vs. Blaze, 7 PM ET, Dell Diamond, Round Rock, TX (per Yahoo Sports listing; not confirmed via AUSL.com which returned 403)
